tasks.desktop: npm run build && deno desktop --allow-env=HOME,USERPROFILE,APPDATA,LOCALAPPDATA,XDG_CONFIG_HOME,DENO_SERVE_ADDRESS --allow-read --allow-write --allow-net --include dist --exclude node_modules desktop/main.ts
tasks.desktop:dev: npm run build && deno desktop --hmr --allow-env=HOME,USERPROFILE,APPDATA,LOCALAPPDATA,XDG_CONFIG_HOME,DENO_SERVE_ADDRESS --allow-read --allow-write --allow-net --include dist --exclude node_modules desktop/main.ts --show-panel
tasks.desktop:package: npm run build && deno desktop --allow-env=HOME,USERPROFILE,APPDATA,LOCALAPPDATA,XDG_CONFIG_HOME,DENO_SERVE_ADDRESS --allow-read --allow-write --allow-net --include dist --exclude node_modules desktop/main.ts
